summary: Kang Hyunwoo navigates a series of challenging survival and personality tests within the ruins of the Senu Academy. By successfully summoning and bonding with his acquaintances—the Emperor, a second companion, and Tengi—he navigates complex moral choices and trivial preference matches. Upon passing all evaluations, Hyunwoo is awarded the 'Trusted One' title and significant stat upgrades, successfully clearing the academy and earning a certificate for the advanced academy.
key_moments: Hyunwoo survives the first test by summoning the Emperor and using Eastern alcohol to appease him.
Hyunwoo completes a preference test with a second acquaintance to prove their compatibility.
Tengi faces a difficult moral dilemma choosing between his master and his desires, ultimately choosing Hyunwoo and passing the final test.
